description_long: This is a medium-sized, yellowish pumpkin with a matte surface and a slightly irregular, organic shape. The pumpkin features a prominent, curved green stem at the top, which is thick and slightly bent. On one side, there are two large, hollow eye cutouts and a jagged, open mouth, giving it a carved, jack-o'-lantern appearance. The facial features are deeply incised, with the mouth showing uneven, tooth-like edges. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is smooth and unadorned, with subtle ridges running vertically from the stem to the base. The interior appears hollow, as seen through the cutouts, suggesting it has been scooped out.
description: A yellow pumpkin with a green stem, carved with large eye holes and a jagged mouth, resembling a jack-o'-lantern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved face with two large eye holes and a jagged mouth, plus the green stem.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the smooth, uncarved surface and the base of the green stem.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the pumpkin's rounded, smooth body with no visible carvings.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the carved face and the smooth, curved back, with the stem visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with two large, irregular eye holes and a jagged, open mouth with tooth-like edges. No additional motifs or surface designs.
